title: Scale Leveling
description: Adds a RPG-Leveling system with spells and much more
body:
RPG-Leveling, Vanilla Friendly Spell System, More Difficulties, Custom Armor Trims, Challenges and More...

![Scale Leveling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/320c7ea1788c4941fbe81f236fe2a60718146724.png)

### Have you ever wanted a simple Souls-like/RPG-style leveling system and vanilla friendly spells? Behold The Scale Leveling Data Pack!

### What does this data pack change/add?

- **RPG-style leveling**, level up six different stats throughout the game. Make your own build. Since the stats make you more powerful than a default player, basically every stat is nerfed at the start.
![Level Up Example](https://i.imgur.com/fT2dFzi.gif)
- **Spell Casting system with 23 unique spells.** A good souls-like always has the spells playstyle right? So does this data pack. Get ready to collect all 23 Spells Pattern and craft 7 Wands to cast them with. Spell Patterns can be crafted and found throughout the game.
![Spell Example](https://i.imgur.com/wdeHIRC.gif)
- **Weapons require different stats.** Just like in souls-like games, you need to level up specific stats to make weapons optimal to your liking.
![Weapon stats showcase](https://i.imgur.com/8OfJeaE.png)
- **Weapons can have new legendary enchantments.** These are specific enchantments only to be used with specific weapons. Some of them are inspired by soulsborne games. (Frostbite, bleeding...) Video is a showcase of the enchantment called "Postponement".
![Postponement Enchantment](https://i.imgur.com/zPDlSW3.gif)
- **Prestige Armor Trims**. Exclusive armor trims than can only be earned by leveling Prestige. This can only be done after reaching max level of every scale stat.
- (Optional) **Advanced Keep_Inventory gamerule.** Die but only lose your experience levels.
- (Optional) **More difficulties.** Simple damage scaling difficulties to spice up the default game. (Also an extra gimmick difficulty included)
- (Optional) **Challenges.** Extra challenges to spice up the game even more. Every challenge requires a harder difficulty. A way to earn extra scale points to level up your character.
- (Optional) **Enhanced Ender Dragon.** Exclusive to the harder difficulties. Simple and fun additions to the base fight to still feel like somewhat vanilla.
### How to play?
1. Download the "zip" file and install it to your resource pack and data pack directory
2. Use command "/reload" (Do this everytime a new player joins)
3. Gaming
### NOTES:
- Only Minecraft versions 1.21.11 - 26.1
- Works in MULTIPLAYER
- Bugs might occur (We have playtested a lot but I can't ensure a bug-free experience)
- I will update this if there are any bugs you find. (For now)
